title: Missing EPROTONOSUPPORT errno definition
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/include/lichen/errno.h
Reference: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c line 417

lichen_link_rx() returns -EPROTONOSUPPORT at line 417:

```c
if (lichen_l2_payload_classify(l2_payload, l2_payload_len) !=
    LICHEN_L2_PAYLOAD_SCHC) {
    ret = -EPROTONOSUPPORT;
    goto cleanup;
}
```

But EPROTONOSUPPORT is not defined in lichen/errno.h for non-Zephyr builds. While it may be available via system headers on some platforms, this creates a portability issue.

Impact: Compilation failure on non-Zephyr builds that lack EPROTONOSUPPORT definition.

Fix: Add EPROTONOSUPPORT to lichen/errno.h:
```c
#ifndef EPROTONOSUPPORT
#define EPROTONOSUPPORT 93
#endif
```
close_reason: fix already implemented in errno.h; verified compiles; updated notes
